name: nested_apriltag_color_board_a3

coordinate_convention.x_positive: paper right / Tag +X / vehicle left after installation
coordinate_convention.y_positive: paper down / Tag +Y / vehicle front after installation
coordinate_convention.z: 0 for all printed color marker centers

color_markers.name: positive_x
color_markers.description: Tag +X，紫色圆形，安装后位于无人车左侧

color_markers.name: negative_x
color_markers.description: Tag -X，紫色正方形，安装后位于无人车右侧

color_markers.name: positive_y
color_markers.description: Tag +Y，绿色圆形，安装后朝无人车车头

color_markers.name: negative_y
color_markers.description: Tag -Y，绿色正方形，安装后朝无人车车尾

color_markers.name: redundant_top_right
color_markers.description: 右上冗余点，纯黄色圆形，用于彩色 PnP 和误检校验

color_markers.name: redundant_bottom_left
color_markers.description: 左下冗余点，纯黄色正方形，用于彩色 PnP 和误检校验

print_note: A3 纸，打印时关闭适合页面/缩放到纸张，按 100% 原始尺寸打印。
